prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 5.0L 1UZ-FE V8 (32-valve, quad-cam) with a fully built 1UZ-FE featuring a forged crankshaft (e.g., Tomei or JUN), forged pistons (CP-Carrillo 87mm), and H-beam connecting rods (Manley or Eagle). Pair with a custom billet cylinder head (Tomei or HKS) ported for high-flow with oversized titanium valves (Supertech) and dual valve springs (BC/PSI).

Forced Induction: Twin-turbo setup using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (custom 3.5-inch inlet, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) with a custom air-to-water intercooler (PWR or GReddy) and a titanium exhaust manifold (HKS or Tomei) with 3.5-inch downpipes and a full 4-inch stainless steel exhaust (Burns Stainless or Fujitsubo).

Drivetrain: Reinforced 6-speed Aisin AW transmission (from Lexus LS460) with a custom billet torque converter (PTC) and a 2.5-way limited-slip differential (OS Giken Super Lock). Upgrade to a carbon fiber driveshaft (Driveshaft Shop) and a custom billet aluminum differential carrier (Tomei).
estetica: Body Kit: Full custom widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny Century-specific overfenders (front and rear), a custom front bumper with integrated carbon fiber splitter (Seibon), and a rear diffuser (Varis). Replace all chrome trim with matte black or carbon fiber (e.g., mirror caps, grille surround).

Suspension: Full air ride setup (Air Lift Performance 3P management) with custom valved monotube struts (Ohlins Road & Track) and adjustable camber plates (BC Racing). Install a custom front sway bar (Whiteline) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for chassis rigidity.

Wheels & Interior: Custom 22x10.5 ET20 (front) and 22x12.5 ET25 (rear) forged wheels (Work Meister S1 3P) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (285/30 and 325/25). Interior upgrades include full Alcantara upholstery (Recaro CS Sportster seats), a custom roll cage (Sparco Pro 2000), and a digital dash (Motec C127) with integrated boost and wideband controllers.
